Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Continued To Apr-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Ruby (Co-Petitioner) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.
Joe Ruby (Co-Petitioner) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court inquired as to whether or not Samuel Ruby and Joe Ruby can competently administer the estate without an Attorney. Samuel stated that he is an Attorney, but not a Probate Attorney, that he is able to read a statute of a Court Rule and that this should be a fairly simple process. Samuel also stated that his Father had a living trust and has been named a Beneficiary of another trust in Nevada, that they opened probate to receive the distribution, that it is a pour over will, that the distribution will go to the trust, and that it will then go to him and his Brother. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will is admitted to probate. Samuel Ruby and Joe Ruby are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for February 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., In Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for January 18, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
